description: An agent has shown a property to several buyers. They need to request feedback from the buyers' agents to share with the seller.

nodes.task_description: Generate a list of all agents who have shown the property in the last week.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves a list of agent names and contact information from the showing service.

nodes.task_description: Send an automated feedback request form to each agent.

expected_outcome.expected: A standardized feedback request email/form is sent to all agents on the list.

nodes.task_description: Compile the received feedback into a summary report for the seller.

expected_outcome.expected: A report summarizing all feedback (e.g., comments on price, condition) is generated.
